name: zapo-manager-root
description: Root orchestrator for Zapo-Manager (Backend and Evolution Manager v2)

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
